messages.content: Напиши письмо на английском клиенту:

Dear [Client],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to follow up on our recent conversation regarding [specific topic]. I wanted to provide you with some additional information and address any further questions or concerns you may have.

First and foremost, I want to thank you for choosing our services. We are grateful for the opportunity to assist you with [specific project]. We have a dedicated team of professionals who are committed to delivering exceptional results and ensuring your satisfaction.

Since our last discussion, I wanted to update you on the progress we have made. Our team has been working diligently to [describe progress or actions taken]. We have made significant strides in [specific area] and are confident that it will contribute to achieving the desired outcome for your project.

In terms of next steps, we have outlined a detailed plan which includes [specific actions or milestones]. We aim to stay on schedule and complete the project within the agreed-upon time frame. Our team will also be in regular communication with you to provide updates, address any concerns, and seek your input throughout the process.

Moreover, I would like to remind you about our exceptional customer support service. If you have any questions or require assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to me directly or our support team at [contact information]. We value your feedback and are committed to ensuring your needs are met.

Once again, thank you for entrusting us with your project. We truly appreciate your business and look forward to continuing our partnership. Should you have any further questions or require any additional information, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Напиши письмо на английском со следующим содержанием: Спасибо за ваш вопрос. Просим прощения что не уведомили ранее - в марте 2023 года было переименование компании. Пожалуйста найдите уведомление в приложении.

Dear [Client],

Thank you for your inquiry. We would like to apologize for not notifying you earlier, but we underwent a company name change in March 2023. We understand the importance of keeping our valued clients informed about such updates.

Please find attached the official notification regarding our company's name change. It contains all the relevant details and explains the reasons behind this decision. We assure you that this change will not impact our commitment to providing high-quality services and maintaining our strong business relationships.

If you have any questions or require further clarification about the name change, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our team is available to address any concerns you may have and offer any necessary support during this transition.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delayed notification. We truly appreciate your understanding and look forward to continuing our mutually beneficial relationship with you under our new name.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Дополни письмо на англ вопросом о том, если что-то еще нужно клиенту в связи с изменением имени пусть сообщат

Dear [Client],

Thank you for your inquiry. We would like to apologize for not notifying you earlier, but we underwent a company name change in March 2023. We understand the importance of keeping our valued clients informed about such updates.

Please find attached the official notification regarding our company's name change. It contains all the relevant details and explains the reasons behind this decision. We assure you that this change will not impact our commitment to providing high-quality services and maintaining our strong business relationships.

If you have any questions or require further clarification about the name change, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our team is available to address any concerns you may have and offer any necessary support during this transition.

Additionally, we would like to ensure that this name change does not affect any ongoing projects or agreements with you. If there are any specific actions we should take or if you require any further documents or information related to the name change, please let us know, and we will be more than happy to assist you.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delayed notification. We truly appreciate your understanding, and we look forward to continuing our mutually beneficial relationship with you under our new name.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Перепиши маленькими буквами: 4TH FLOOR, EQUITABLE HOUSE KING WILLIAM STREET, LONDON, ENGLAND, UNITED KINGDOM, EC4R 9AF
4th floor, equitable house king william street, london, england, united kingdom, ec4r 9af

Перепиши на дружелюбном хорошем английском, попроси скидку за жилье: Çiğdem hi! I like the apartment :) Is there a microwave? And is it possible to get some discount because I'll stay alone and promise to be very tidy ))

Hi Çiğdem!

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to let you know that I really love the apartment you have listed. It looks perfect for my needs! I just have a couple of quick questions before making a decision.

Firstly, I wanted to inquire if there is a microwave in the apartment. It would be really convenient for me during my stay.

Additionally, I was wondering if there is any possibility of getting a discount on the rental price. Since I will be staying alone, I will ensure that the apartment is well-maintained and tidy throughout my stay. I promise to treat it with the utmost care and respect. 

I'm really excited about the possibility of renting your apartment. It seems like a great fit for me. Thank you for considering my questions and the discount request.

Looking forward to your response!

Best regards,
(Your name)
Перепиши на дружелюбном хорошем английском, попроси скидку за жилье: Çiğdem hi! I like the apartment :) Is it possible to get some discount because I’ll stay alone and promise to be very tidy ))

Hi Çiğdem!

I hope you're doing well. I just wanted to reach out and say that I absolutely love the apartment you have listed. It's exactly what I'm looking for! 

I had a quick question for you: would it be possible to receive a discount on the rental price? Since I will be staying alone, I can assure you that I'll be very tidy and take great care of the apartment. 

I'm really excited about the opportunity to rent your apartment and I appreciate you considering my request for a discount.

Thank you so much!

Warm regards,
(Your name)
Напиши письмо в отель на английском: можно ли остаться в последний день до 13:00 и оставить сумки до вечера в отеле

Dear [Hotel Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to inquire about the possibility of extending my stay until 13:00 on my check-out day and leaving my luggage at the hotel until later in the evening.

I have thoroughly enjoyed my stay at your hotel and have been impressed with the exceptional service provided by your staff. Due to my travel arrangements, it would be extremely convenient for me to have the option to check-out at 13:00 instead of the regular check-out time. This would allow me some extra time to relax and prepare for my onward journey.

Additionally, I would greatly appreciate it if I could leave my luggage at the hotel after check-out until the evening. This would enable me to explore the city without the burden of carrying my bags. I understand that there might be a nominal fee associated with this service, and I am happy to pay for this convenience.

I genuinely value the comfort and hospitality that your hotel has provided throughout my stay. I believe that these additional arrangements would enhance my overall experience and ensure a seamless and stress-free departure.

Thank you in advance for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response. Should you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
добавь в этот же текст вопрос есть ли микроволновка

Dear [Hotel Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to inquire about the possibility of extending my stay until 13:00 on my check-out day and leaving my luggage at the hotel until later in the evening.

I have thoroughly enjoyed my stay at your hotel and have been impressed with the exceptional service provided by your staff. Due to my travel arrangements, it would be extremely convenient for me to have the option to check-out at 13:00 instead of the regular check-out time. Additionally, I would greatly appreciate it if I could leave my luggage at the hotel after check-out until the evening. On another note, I wanted to inquire if there is a microwave available for guest use in the hotel. It would be helpful to have access to a microwave during my stay.

I genuinely value the comfort and hospitality that your hotel has provided throughout my stay. I believe that these additional arrangements, along with the availability of a microwave, would enhance my overall experience and ensure a seamless and stress-free departure.

Thank you in advance for considering my requests. I look forward to your positive response. Should you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
